creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
Port oooqs2 installs file oooqs2.desktop. which does not described at pkg-plist. This patch fix problem

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to install oooqs2 i.e. at /tmp/1. Try to uninstalll oooqs2. Look at contents of /tmp/1 and make sure. that oooqs2.desktop still here
